content_of_post_to_comment:
Theres so much I want to do in life and people I really want to help, but to do that I need to work hard. The problem is, whenever I try to bring myself to do anything I just can’t. I either lay around doing nothing, go to what I’m trying to do and just space out, or force myself to do it and give myself a massive headache. I had been planning to enlist into the military and just assumed that would fix most of this as an easy out, but with everything going on in the US right now it feels too unethical.

Its not because I am trying to do too much, it’s because I can't bring myself to do anything. Trying to work on anything gives me headaches and I just tend to do nothing instead. How can I force myself to do things instead of being lazy all day? Am I just doomed until I can find a way to force myself? Is there a type of environment or situation I can put myself in that would make me have to adapt and teach me these skills? Any advice would help.
